name: grist
description: Work with Grist documents through MCP tools and a direct REST fallback helper.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, query, and update Grist docs.
interface.longDescription: Adds a pinned Grist MCP server for rich document, schema, SQL, page, webhook, and record workflows, plus a zero-dependency REST helper for direct troubleshooting and explicit fallback operations against self-hosted or hosted Grist.
defaultPrompt: Read records from this Grist table.
